errors.loadFailed: Failed to load data. Please try again.

login.title: Sign In
login.errorSuspended: Your account has been suspended. Contact administrator.

journal.title: General Journal
journal.linesHint: Debit and credit must balance before saving.

new.title: Create Journal
new.subtitle: Create a manual journal draft. Posting is performed from the detail page after review.
new.missingMasterData: Postable accounts or active locations are not ready, or your account does not have accounting access.

attachments.title: Attachments
attachments.subtitle: Supporting documents and transaction evidence.
attachments.uploadInfo: Upload transaction evidence, photos, or supporting documents directly from this device.

import.title: Import Journal CSV
import.subtitle: Upload a CSV file using the template. Each combination of date, location, description, and reference becomes one draft journal.
import.templateHint: Use account codes from the COA and active location codes. Debit and credit are in Rupiah with no decimals.
import.missingMasterData: Postable accounts or active locations are not ready.

coa.title: Chart of Accounts
coa.subtitle: Add, edit, deactivate, and complete account names in ID/EN/ZH.
coa.name: Account Name
coa.emptyHint: Try adjusting your search or filter.

pettyCash.title: Petty Cash
pettyCash.subtitle: Monitor petty cash balance per location and transaction history.
pettyCash.noAccounts: No petty cash accounts. Contact admin to create one.

purchasing.title: Purchasing
purchasing.subtitle: Manage suppliers and purchase orders from the ERP.
purchasing.itemsHint: Products shown here have purchasable status.

new.title: Create Purchase Order
new.subtitle: Create a PO from an active supplier. Once approved, goods receipt is recorded through GRN so inventory and journals remain consistent.
new.missingMasterData: Suppliers, active locations, or purchasable products are not ready. Complete those records before creating a PO.

copy.subtitle: Manage background jobs such as backup, stock alerts, payroll, and site cache. Worker picks up changes automatically.
copy.howItWorksBody: The worker reads schedules from the database every 60 seconds. Toggle jobs or edit cron from this page. Cron format:

backup.label: Database Backup
backup.description: Daily database backup to off-site storage (S3/R2)

payrollBatch.label: Monthly Payroll Processing
payrollBatch.description: Calculate and process payroll on the 8th of each month

stockLowAlert.label: Low Stock Alert
stockLowAlert.description: Weekly stock level check every Monday morning

isrRevalidate.label: Cache Revalidation
isrRevalidate.description: Revalidate public page cache each morning

empty.title: No scheduled jobs
empty.body: Schedules are created through seed data or this settings page.

products.title: Products & Menu
products.subtitle: Manage sale items, raw materials, variant prices, images, and categories from the ERP.
products.confirmDeactivate: Deactivate this product? It will no longer appear on POS.

form.name: Product name
form.nameHint: Use English for all product and ingredient names.

categories.title: Product Categories
categories.subtitle: Manage POS product categories from this page.
categories.name: Category Name
categories.hasProducts: Cannot delete a category that still has active products.

stockPerOutlet.title: Stock per Outlet
stockPerOutlet.subtitle: Current stock summary by outlet. Use the buttons above to adjust stock via opname or adjustment.
stockPerOutlet.empty: No products in this category yet.

opname.title: Stock Opname
opname.subtitle: Manage stock opname sessions and inventory adjustments.

newSession.title: Create Opname Session
newSession.subtitle: Create a new stock opname session. The system will snapshot current stock as baseline.

detail.uncountedWarning: {count} lines not yet counted. Fill the "Counted" column and click "Save".
detail.allCountedMsg: All lines have been counted. Click "Submit Opname" to calculate variances.
detail.afterApproval: After approval, the system will create an adjustment journal entry.

variance.title: Inventory Variance
variance.subtitle: Stock opname variance report per session and product.
variance.loadFailed: Failed to load data. Please try again.

adjust.title: Quick Adjustment
adjust.subtitle: Create a one-product stock adjustment and submit it to the approval workflow. Approved adjustments create stock movements and journal entries automatically.
adjust.notesPlaceholder: Example: mini stock count variance / damaged goods
adjust.success: Adjustment created and submitted for approval.
adjust.missingMasterData: Active locations or products are not ready.

pos.title: Point of Sale
pos.nonCashOverpay: Non-cash payments must match the amount due. Use cash when change is needed.
pos.memberNotFound: Member not found. Continue as walk-in or register a new member.
pos.memberLookupFailed: Could not search member. Try again.
pos.confirmVoid: Are you sure you want to void this order?
pos.shiftAlreadyOpen: Shift is already open at this location
pos.customDonationHint: Type the amount the customer wants to donate. The remaining change is given in cash.

demo.bannerLabel: DEMO MODE — Transactions not in system
demo.resetDemoDesc: Clear demo order history only. Master data kept.
demo.exitDemoModeDesc: Clear all demo data + return to production POS.
demo.snapshotHelp: Make sure production POS has been opened on this browser before. Products, prices, and modifiers must be saved in browser IndexedDB.
demo.noMasterDataHelp: Open production POS first to load products, prices, and modifiers, then return to demo mode.

pos.noActiveStore: No active outlet is available for POS. Activate an outlet in location data first.

app.name: Aroadri Tea ERP
app.company: PT Gandha Hill Catering Management Indonesia

employees.title: Employees
employees.description: Manage employee records, contracts, attendance, leave, and payroll.
employees.searchPlaceholder: Search name, email, NIK, or phone
employees.name: Name

form.passwordHint: Min 8 chars. The employee can change it after first login.

messages.geolocationUnsupported: This browser does not support geolocation.
messages.locationPermissionDenied: Location permission was denied. Enable location access in the browser.
messages.employeeMissing: Employee data was not found. Sign in with an employee account.
messages.noShift: No shift is available. Contact an administrator to activate shift master data.
messages.noEmployeeLinked: This account is not linked to an employee record. Contact an administrator.

leave.title: Leave
leave.noAccess: You do not have HR access.
leave.subtitle: Monitor leave types, employee leave balances, and recent leave requests.

pages.title: Pages
pages.subtitle: Manage static site pages (home, about, menu, etc.)
pages.createFirst: Create your first page for the website.
pages.slugHint: Slug cannot be changed after creation.
pages.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this page?

posts.title: Posts
posts.subtitle: Manage news, promos, recipes, and events.
posts.createFirst: Create your first post for blog or promos.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.subtitle: Create new roles, edit role names, and check required permissions.
permissions.noAccess: This account does not have access to manage permissions.

attendance.title: Attendance Policy
attendance.subtitle: Adjust late/absent penalties and the monthly free-late allowance per company policy.
attendance.penaltyHint: Automatically applied to the monthly payroll calculation for each employee.
attendance.forbidden: Account does not have permission to manage system settings.

loyalty.title: Loyalty Settings
loyalty.subtitle: Adjust point earn rate and tier thresholds per your loyalty programme.
loyalty.earnRateHint: Each member customer earns 1 point per amount of net purchase below.
loyalty.tiersHint: Add / remove tiers and set lifetime-points thresholds. The first tier must start at 0.
loyalty.forbidden: Account does not have permission to manage system settings.
loyalty.invalidTiers: At least one valid tier required.
loyalty.firstTierMustBeZero: The first (entry) tier must start at 0 points.

locations.title: Locations
locations.subtitle: Manage outlets, internal offices, warehouses, addresses, active status, currency, and timezone from the ERP.

customFields.title: Custom Fields
customFields.subtitle: Add and manage custom columns per module.
customFields.confirmDelete: Delete field "{name}"? Stored data will remain.

pos.title: POS Settings
pos.subtitle: Configure POS accounting posting, delivery channels, platform commissions, and receipt size per outlet.
pos.noLocations: No locations yet. Seed locations before configuring POS.
pos.receiptWidthHint: Default is 80 mm / 8 cm; adjust to the printer when needed.
pos.receiptPrinterHint: Thermal receipt printer name registered in the cashier OS.
pos.labelPrinterHint: Cup label printer name in the cashier OS (optional).
pos.kioskPrintingHintBefore: Skip the print preview dialog and print directly. Launch Chrome with the flag
pos.kioskPrintingHintAfter: so the dialog is suppressed; without the flag the browser still shows preview.
pos.deliveryChannelsHint: Set each platform display name and commission.

promotions.title: Promotions
promotions.subtitle: Manage percentage discounts, fixed discounts, buy X get Y, free items, complimentary items, delivery channels, and quotas from the ERP.

workflow.title: Approval Workflows
workflow.subtitle: Define approval flows per module.
workflow.noConditions: No conditions — applies to all data of this module
workflow.howItWorksDesc: Active workflows trigger automatically when new data is created. Conditions are evaluated against the data; the highest-priority matching workflow runs.
workflow.confirmDelete: Delete this workflow? Running instances will remain.

dailySummary.title: Daily Summary
dailySummary.loadFailed: Failed to load data. Please try again.
dailySummary.noActiveOutlets: No active outlets for daily report.

donations.title: Donations
donations.empty: No donation data for this period

hourlySales.title: Hourly Sales
hourlySales.empty: No sales data for this period

omzetHarian.title: Daily Revenue
omzetHarian.subtitle: PB1-exclusive omzet with manual fiscal adjustment.
omzetHarian.howItWorksDesc: Columns C–E are auto-filled from sales data. Column F (Adjustment) is for manual corrections (returns, cancelled transactions, etc). Export Excel for Coretax tax reporting.
omzetHarian.fiscalWarning: Fiscal omzet differs from accounting omzet by Rp {diff} ({direction}).

errors.allLinesMustBeCounted: All lines must be counted before submission

account.title: My Account
account.subtitle: Manage login identity, default language, email, and password.
account.emailSaved: Email updated. Email verification will be requested again when enabled.
account.emailInUse: Email is already used by another account.
account.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 12 characters.

audit.title: Audit Trail
audit.subtitle: Trace critical changes across ERP modules: who did what, when, and which data changed.
audit.empty: No audit records match this filter.

files.uploadFailed: Upload failed. Check file size or type.

editor.title: Edit ERP Docs
editor.subtitle: Update guides, tutorials, and work instructions from the UI. Saved changes become the Docs page content immediately.
editor.markdownHelp: Use ## for section headings, ### for subsections, 1. for ordered steps, and - for control lists. Internal links can be written as ?Label: /page-path?.
editor.unauthorized: Session expired. Please sign in again.
